name: Pan Hong Holdings Group Limited
summary: Pan Hong Holdings Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the development of residential and commercial properties in the second and third-tier cities in the People's Republic of China. It is also involved in the operation and management of hotels; investment management activities; provision of property consultation services; and general trading and consultancy services businesses. The company was formerly known as Pan Hong Property Group Limited and changed its name to Pan Hong Holdings Group Limited in September 2015. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is headquartered in Hunghom, Hong Kong. Pan Hong Holdings Group Limited is a subsidiary of Extra Good Enterprises Limited.
